root_text.an5.250:1.3: Yasmiṁ, bhikkhave, puggale puggalo abhippasanno hoti, so tathārūpaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti yathārūpāya āpattiyā saṅgho ukkhipati.
root_text.an5.250:1.5: ‘yo kho myāyaṁ puggalo piyo manāpo so saṅghena ukkhitto’ti.
root_text.an5.250:1.7: Bhikkhūsu appasādabahulo samāno aññe bhikkhū na bhajati.
root_text.an5.250:1.8: Aññe bhikkhū abhajanto saddhammaṁ na suṇāti.
root_text.an5.250:2.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, yasmiṁ puggale puggalo abhippasanno hoti, so tathārūpaṁ āpattiṁ āpanno hoti yathārūpāya āpattiyā saṅgho ante nisīdāpeti.
root_text.an5.250:2.3: ‘yo kho myāyaṁ puggalo piyo manāpo so saṅghena ante nisīdāpito’ti.
root_text.an5.250:2.5: Bhikkhūsu appasādabahulo samāno aññe bhikkhū na bhajati.
root_text.an5.250:2.6: Aññe bhikkhū abhajanto saddhammaṁ na suṇāti.
root_text.an5.250:3.1: Puna caparaṁ, bhikkhave, yasmiṁ puggale puggalo abhippasanno hoti, so disāpakkanto hoti …pe… so vibbhanto hoti …pe… so kālaṅkato hoti.
root_text.an5.250:3.3: ‘yo kho myāyaṁ puggalo piyo manāpo so kālaṅkato’ti.
root_text.an5.250:3.5: Aññe bhikkhū abhajanto saddhammaṁ na suṇāti.
root_text.an5.250:3.8: Ime kho, bhikkhave, pañca ādīnavā puggalappasāde”ti.

translation_text.an5.250:1.1: “Mendicants, there are these five drawbacks of placing faith in an individual.
translation_text.an5.250:1.3: The individual to whom an individual is devoted falls into an offense such that the Saṅgha suspends them.
translation_text.an5.250:1.5: ‘This individual dear and beloved to me has been suspended by the Saṅgha.’
translation_text.an5.250:1.6: They lose much of their faith in mendicants.
translation_text.an5.250:1.7: So they don’t frequent other mendicants,
translation_text.an5.250:1.8: they don’t hear the true teaching,
translation_text.an5.250:1.9: and they fall away from the true teaching.
translation_text.an5.250:1.10: This is the first drawback in placing faith in an individual.
translation_text.an5.250:2.1: Furthermore, the individual to whom an individual is devoted falls into an offense such that the Saṅgha makes them sit at the end of the line. …
translation_text.an5.250:2.8: This is the second drawback in placing faith in an individual.
translation_text.an5.250:3.1: Furthermore, the individual to whom an individual is devoted leaves for another region … disrobes … passes away.
translation_text.an5.250:3.3: ‘This individual dear and beloved to me has passed away.’
translation_text.an5.250:3.4: So they don’t frequent other mendicants,
translation_text.an5.250:3.5: they don’t hear the true teaching,
translation_text.an5.250:3.6: and they fall away from the true teaching.
translation_text.an5.250:3.7: This is the fifth drawback in placing faith in an individual.
translation_text.an5.250:3.8: These are the five drawbacks of placing faith in an individual.”
